creator: never@nevermind.kiev.ua
text:
After upgrading pecl-APC to 3.1.9 users experience error messages "Unknown: apc_fcntl_unlock failed: in Unknown 0" and PHP scripts abort execution when apc enabled.

Fix: Add patch attached (provided by vendor: http://pecl.php.net/bugs/bug.php?id=22688 )



Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat:         Install apache, php, enable APC in php.ini
